description: A pipe tee fitting with a main run pipe along the X axis and a perpendicular branch pipe along the +Z axis, featuring a continuous hollow T-shaped interior.
notes: Position the main pipe centered at the origin along the X axis (X from -50 to 50). Position the branch pipe starting from the origin (Z=0) extending to Z=50. Use constructive solid geometry (CSG) to union the outer shapes of both cylinders, union the inner shapes (the hollow cavities) of both cylinders, and subtract the inner union from the outer union to ensure a perfectly clean and continuous internal T-junction flow path.
